pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.1.9 to 3.2.0 to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE.
Update the target Java version property from 11 to 21.
Add Kotlin standard library dependencies required for compilation.
Add Kotlin reflection library for runtime introspection.
Add Kotlin common standard library dependency.
Add Kotlin JDK 8 specific standard library dependency.
Add Jakarta Persistence API to replace javax.persistence for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Add Jakarta Validation API to replace javax.validation for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Add Ktorm core library for database access.
Add Ktorm PostgreSQL support library.
Add Ktorm Jackson integration for serialization.
Add Jackson Kotlin module for proper serialization support.
Add Flyway dependency for database migration management.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI starter for API documentation generation.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI UI starter for Swagger UI interface.
Add Reactor Core for reactive programming support.
Add ImgScalr library for image scaling operations.
Add Azure Storage Blob SDK for cloud storage integration.
Add Mockito-Kotlin extension for testing.
Add Spek DSL for Kotlin-based testing framework.
Add Spek JUnit5 runner for executing tests.
Add JUnit Platform Runner for test execution.
Add Kotlin Test JUnit integration.
Add Spring Test dependency explicitly.
Add Kotlin Maven Plugin to compile Kotlin source code.
Add Kotlin All-Open plugin for Spring and JPA annotations.
Add Kotlin No-Arg plugin for JPA entity constructors.
Configure Maven to look for Kotlin sources in src/main/kotlin.
Configure Maven to look for Kotlin test sources in src/test/kotlin.
Update the project group ID to reflect new naming conventions.
Update the project description to be more specific.
Add Spring Boot configuration processor for metadata generation.
Add Spring Boot JDBC starter dependency.
Add H2 in-memory database for testing.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver dependency.
Add Maven Surefire plugin for running tests.
Add Maven Compiler plugin with explicit executions.
Configure Spring Boot Maven plugin to exclude configuration processor and enable admin.
Add pre-integration-test and post-integration-test executions to Spring Boot plugin.
Add Maven repositories for dependencies including JCenter and Spring Releases.
Remove Lombok dependency as it is no longer used.
Remove Spring Boot DevTools dependency.
Remove Spotify Dockerfile Maven plugin.
Remove Maven Dependency plugin unpack execution.

.gitignore.general_idea: Exclude generated or large demo photo directories from version control to keep the repository clean.
Add standard macOS-specific ignore patterns to prevent OS metadata files from being tracked.
Ignore VS Code specific temporary files like attach pid files.
Add standard Linux-specific ignore patterns for temporary files and trash folders.
Add comprehensive macOS-specific ignore patterns for system files and thumbnails.
Add standard Windows-specific ignore patterns for cache files, shortcuts, and installer files.
Exclude environment configuration files containing sensitive data or local settings from version control.
Exclude local blob storage simulation files from version control.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the base Docker image from OpenJDK 11 to OpenJDK 21 to support the new Java version.
Refactor the Dockerfile into a multi-stage build to separate the Maven build environment from the runtime environment.
Dockerfile.human_impl: Added 'FROM openjdk:21-slim AS MAVEN_BUILD' stage and 'FROM openjdk:21-slim' runtime stage.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Maven inside the build stage to compile the application within the container.
Dockerfile.human_impl: RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y maven

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the artifact source from a pre-built JAR to copying source code and pom.xml for in-container building.
Add a non-root user for the runtime stage to improve container security.
Dockerfile.human_impl: RUN addgroup --system spring && adduser --system --ingroup spring spring && USER spring:spring

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the entrypoint to reference the specific JAR filename produced by the build stage.
Explicitly set the server port environment variable and expose it in the Dockerfile.

docker-compose.deploy.yml.general_idea: Upgrade Docker Compose file format version from 2 to 3 to support newer features and syntax.
Define a dedicated internal network for service communication.
Rename the API service from photo-api to hilfling-backend to reflect project naming.
Update the backend container image to the new project-specific image.
Mount a local directory for static files into the backend container.
Explicitly define startup dependencies for the backend service.
Map and expose ports for the backend service.
Configure database connection environment variables for the backend.
Update Traefik routing labels for the backend to use new hostnames and SSL.
Add a new service definition for serving static frontend assets.
Configure Traefik routing labels for the new static service.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Upgrade docker-compose file format version from 2 to 3 to support newer features like networks and volumes definitions in the root.
Introduce Traefik as a reverse proxy and load balancer to manage routing and SSL termination for the services.
Define a custom bridge network to isolate and connect the application services securely.
Rename and reconfigure the backend service to use the new network, environment variables for database connection, and Traefik labels.
Rename and reconfigure the PostgreSQL service to use environment variables for credentials and connect to the custom network.
Add a pgAdmin service for database administration and visualization.
Add a service to serve static files using Nginx.
Add an Azurite service to emulate Azure Blob Storage for local development and testing.

mvnw.general_idea: Corrected the header comment to remove the outdated '2' from 'Maven2'.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed '# Maven2 Start Up Batch script' to '# Maven Start Up Batch script'

mvnw.general_idea: Removed an obsolete TODO comment regarding classpath handling in the mingw section.
Upgraded the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.4.2 to 0.5.6 to align with newer wrapper standards.
Added support for custom Maven repository URLs via the MVNW_REPOURL environment variable.
mvnw.human_impl: Added conditional logic to prepend $MVNW_REPOURL to the jarUrl if set

mvnw.general_idea: Enabled authenticated downloads for the Maven Wrapper JAR using MVNW_USERNAME and MVNW_PASSWORD.
mvnw.human_impl: Added conditional wget/curl flags for --http-user/--http-password or --user

mvnw.general_idea: Fixed path handling for Cygwin environments by converting paths to Windows format before execution.
mvnw.human_impl: Added cygpath conversion for wrapperJarPath and javaClass when $cygwin is true

mvnw.general_idea: Standardized CLI argument passing by exporting MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS for consistent behavior across platforms.

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.4.2 to 0.5.6 to align with newer Maven standards.
Quote the path to maven-wrapper.properties to handle spaces in directory names correctly.
Introduce MVNW_VERBOSE environment variable support to control download status output.
Allow overriding the Maven repository URL via MVNW_REPOURL for custom or internal repositories.
Enable authentication for downloading the wrapper JAR using MVNW_USERNAME and MVNW_PASSWORD.
Force the use of TLS 1.2 for the WebClient to ensure compatibility with modern HTTPS endpoints.
Capture command line arguments into MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS for standardized handling across platforms.
Correct a typo in the header comment from 'Maven2' to 'Maven'.
Correct a typo in the comment from 'key stroke' to 'keystroke'.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: @REM MAVEN_BATCH_PAUSE - set to 'on' to wait for a keystroke before ending

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Fix grammatical error in comment from 'my setting' to 'by setting'.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: @REM enable echoing by setting MAVEN_BATCH_ECHO to 'on'

postgres/Dockerfile.general_idea: Changed the default PostgreSQL database name from 'photodb' to 'hilflingdb' to align with the new project identity.
Removed the custom SQL initialization script and its directory setup, likely moving initialization logic elsewhere or simplifying the container.
postgres/Dockerfile.human_impl: Removed RUN mkdir /base-sql and COPY postgres/sql/init.sql /base-sql

scripts/connect_db.sh.general_idea: Update the database connection script to use specific credentials and database name instead of default ones.
scripts/connect_db.sh.human_impl: docker-compose exec postgres psql -U hilfling -d hilflingdb

scripts/dropdreacreatedb.sh.general_idea: Changed the database user in the script from postgres to hilfling to match the application's configured database credentials.
Replaced the execution of an initialization SQL file with explicit commands to drop and recreate the specific application database.
